active_goal: Standalone Swift macOS app with native backend engine and GRDB-backed data store

features.title: Shadow-port pure GitHub status derivation to Swift with parity fixtures

features.notes: Runtime dispatch remains Python until later backend-engine slices consume Swift implementation.

features.title: Move AppKit and UserNotifications default seams into executable target

features.notes: Feature target keeps pure closure seams and test-safe defaults.

features.title: Rename AgendumMacCore to AgendumBackend and AgendumMacWorkflow to AgendumFeature
features.evidence: Issue #37 closed as completed; PR #38 merged into feature/mac-prototype on 2026-05-07 as squash commit 6f6d388. Local validation passed: swift build, swift test --enable-code-coverage, Python unittest discover, Python coverage 499/540 lines (92.4%), swift run smoke, strict build-surface stale grep, docs audit, jq, and git diff --check. GitHub Actions Test passed on PR #38.

features.title: Persist selection, sidebar visibility, and filter state with @SceneStorage
features.evidence: Issue #40 closed as completed; PR #41 merged into feature/mac-prototype on 2026-05-08 as squash commit 0650976. Local validation passed: swift build, swift test --enable-code-coverage (121 XCTest tests plus 7 Swift Testing tests), Python unittest discover (68 tests), Python coverage 499/540 lines (92.4%), swift run startup smoke, jq, git diff --check. GitHub Actions Test passed on PR #41. Manual bundle smoke found and fixed sidebar selection and filter/source/page-size persistence across launches; adversarial follow-up fixed fallback overwrite risk for restored default scenes.
features.notes: Residual split-view column-width persistence is layout polish, not A3 state-restoration scope.

features.title: Realign Mac dashboard around terminal-style sectioned task list
features.evidence: Issue #42 closed as completed; PR #43 merged into feature/mac-prototype on 2026-05-08 as squash commit d516b86. Local implementation on codex/visual-layout-direction passed: swift build; swift build --target AgendumMac; swift test --filter AgendumFeatureTests.TaskWorkflowModelTests (111 XCTest tests before review fix); swift test --enable-code-coverage (126 XCTest tests plus 7 Swift Testing tests before review fix); Python unittest discover (68 tests); Python coverage 499/540 lines (92.4%); Scripts/build_app_bundle.sh; bundle existence/executable checks; plutil -lint; swift run AgendumMac launch smoke; jq; git diff --check. PR review fix for stale hidden-task selection/action targeting passed: swift build --target AgendumMac; focused visible-section lookup test; swift test --enable-code-coverage (127 XCTest tests plus 7 Swift Testing tests); git diff --check. Adversarial F1 repo fallback fix passed: swift test --filter TaskWorkflowModelTests (114 XCTest tests); swift build --target AgendumMac; git diff --check. GitHub Actions Test passed on PR #43 merge head.
features.notes: Default source is All; Issues and Manual are separate sections; task actions are in a focused sheet opened from the selected row; status/section colors mirror ../agendum/src/agendum/widgets.py.

features.title: TaskStore actor + TaskStoreProviding protocol seam
features.evidence: Issue #48 closed; PR #49 merged into feature/mac-prototype on 2026-05-09 as squash commit b33e8d6 after four adversarial review passes. Final validation: swift build; swift test --enable-code-coverage (129 XCTest + 36 Swift Testing tests, 18 of which are TaskStoreTests); Python unittest 68 tests; swift run smoke; git diff --check; GitHub Actions Test passed (1m33s). Review fixes across four passes: Task leak in observe fixed via onTermination cancellation; markSeen sets seen + last_seen_at + updated_at to match Python update_task; sort order changed to seen ASC, updated_at DESC, id DESC to match Python get_active_tasks; limit clamped to 1..200; terminal statuses (merged/closed/done) excluded by default; timestamps emitted in Python-compatible yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSSSS+00:00 format so Swift- and Python-written rows sort lexicographically together.
features.notes: Foundation for the speed-run port. S1 will route BackendStatusModel directly through TaskStore for reads/mutations/manual create.

features.title: Wire dashboard reads through TaskStoreProviding (old plan)
features.evidence: Superseded by 2026-05-09 speed-run plan revision. C3 was the bridge slice that assumed Python sync would keep writing to SQLite while Swift took over reads — that requires a Python-process observation strategy (IPC vs file-system watcher vs polling) which is non-trivial plumbing. The speed-run plan tears Python out wholesale, so the bridge is never built. Equivalent app-side wiring is folded into S1.

features.title: Add native GRDB-backed data store
features.evidence: C1 (PR #45, c9cebde) and C2 (PR #49, b33e8d6) merged into feature/mac-prototype. C3/C4 (dashboard reads + mutations) folded into speed-run S1. C5 (Application Support relocation) deferred to post-MVP per the 2026-05-09 plan revision.
features.notes: Tracked by epic #26 (body to be updated to reflect speed-run sequence).

features.title: Speed-run port: tear Python out, ship MVP viewer
features.evidence: Captured in 2026-05-09 plan revision. Sequence: S0 (write docs/syncer-spec.md), S1 (BackendStatusModel direct → TaskStore), S2 (port gh.py + gh_review.py to Swift via URLSession), S3 (port syncer.py per S0 spec), S4 (delete Backend/ + helper bridge). Source of truth: ../agendum/src/agendum/ (original CLI), NOT Backend/agendum_engine/ (vendored fork that doubled with mac-specific complexity).
features.notes: Deferred to post-MVP: B4 (native OAuth, keep gh CLI dep through MVP), C5 (DB relocation), A6 (polish), multi-workspace machinery.

features.title: S0: Write docs/syncer-spec.md from ../agendum/ source
features.notes: Doc-only PR. Read ../agendum/src/agendum/syncer.py (419 LOC) + dependents (gh.py 605, gh_review.py 147, db.py 151, task_api.py 175, config.py 213). Capture: data model, sync lifecycle, attention rules, close suppression, MVP cuts, parity-test fixtures.

features.title: S1: BackendStatusModel direct → TaskStore (subsumes old C3+C4+B3-app)
features.notes: Port task_api.py + remaining db.py writes into TaskStore (Swift). Wire BackendStatusModel directly. Single implicit workspace (drop multi-workspace abstraction).

features.title: S2: Port gh.py + gh_review.py to Swift URLSession
features.notes: REST + GraphQL via URLSession. Auth via gh auth status token reuse for MVP.

features.title: S3: Port syncer.py to Swift per S0 spec
features.notes: Highest-risk slice. Tests: spec invariants (primary) + Python parity oracle (secondary). Depends on S0 + S2.

features.title: S4: Delete Backend/, AgendumBackendClient, helper bridge
features.notes: Tombstone PR. Retire docs/backend-contract.md to historical-reference.

features.title: Add AgendumMacStore target on GRDB with TaskRecord schema
features.evidence: Issue #44 completed by PR #45, merged into feature/mac-prototype as squash commit c9cebde. Local branch codex/c1-grdb-store-schema added Package.swift GRDB dependency resolved to 7.10.0, Package.resolved, Sources/AgendumMacStore/Schema.swift, and Tests/AgendumMacStoreTests/TaskRecordTests.swift. Validation passed: swift build; swift test --filter AgendumMacStoreTests; swift test --enable-code-coverage; swift run AgendumMac launch smoke; jq; git diff --check; GitHub Actions Test passed on PR #45. Adversarial review fixes added legacy gh_node_id column migration coverage, stronger schema/index tests, non-optional timestamp construction, a persistence guard against writing nil required timestamps, nullable seen reads, and repeatable active-status cleanup.
features.notes: No runtime dashboard wiring. C2 must use DatabaseSchema.prepare(_:) and cover nullable seen / nullable legacy timestamps in record-to-domain mapping tests.

features.title: Remove Python helper runtime and replace backend engine with Swift services
features.evidence: B1 (vendor) and B2 (status-derivation port + parity fixtures) merged. Remaining work folded into the 2026-05-09 speed-run plan: S1 subsumes app-side helper command paths and most of B3; S2 subsumes GitHub transport (preparatory for old B5); S3 subsumes the syncer port (most of old B5); S4 subsumes B6 (delete the bridge). B4 (native OAuth) deferred to post-MVP.
features.notes: Tracked by epic #25 (body to be updated to reflect speed-run sequence).
